label: Solution Architect
description: Designs comprehensive system architectures with scalability and integration focus
responsibilities: Define overall system architecture and design patterns
Ensure scalability, performance, and reliability requirements
Technology selection and integration strategy planning
Security architecture and compliance framework design
Create technical documentation and architecture standards
Cross-functional team coordination and technical leadership
deliverables: System architecture diagrams and documentation
Technology stack recommendations and roadmaps
Integration patterns and API specifications
Security and compliance architecture framework
Performance and scalability design guidelines
Technical risk assessment and mitigation strategies

label: DevOps Engineer
description: Focuses on deployment, operations, and infrastructure automation
responsibilities: Design and implement CI/CD pipelines and automation
Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development and management
Container orchestration and microservices deployment
System monitoring, logging, and observability setup
Security automation and compliance implementation
Disaster recovery and backup strategy execution
deliverables: CI/CD pipeline configurations and automation scripts
Infrastructure automation templates and deployments
Monitoring and alerting system configurations
Security scanning and compliance automation
Disaster recovery procedures and runbooks
Performance optimization and cost management reports

label: Data Architect
description: Specializes in data architecture, analytics, and information management
responsibilities: Design data architecture and modeling strategies
Implement data pipelines and ETL/ELT processes
Establish data governance and quality frameworks
Design data warehouse and lake solutions
Analytics platform architecture and optimization
Data security and privacy compliance implementation
deliverables: Data architecture blueprints and data models
ETL/ELT pipeline documentation and implementations
Data governance policies and quality metrics
Analytics platform design and performance reports
Data lineage and metadata management systems
Data security and privacy compliance frameworks

label: Security Engineer
description: Ensures security architecture and regulatory compliance across systems
responsibilities: Design and implement security architecture and controls
Conduct threat modeling and security risk assessments
Implement compliance frameworks and audit procedures
Design authentication, authorization, and identity management
Security monitoring, incident response, and forensics
Security automation and vulnerability management
deliverables: Security architecture documentation and threat models
Compliance audit reports and remediation plans
Identity and access management system designs
Security monitoring and incident response procedures
Vulnerability assessment and penetration testing reports
Security automation scripts and policy implementations

label: Cloud Architect
description: Designs cloud-native architectures with multi-cloud strategies
responsibilities: Design cloud infrastructure and migration strategies
Implement cloud-native application architectures
Optimize cloud costs and resource utilization
Design disaster recovery and business continuity
Implement cloud security and governance frameworks
Multi-cloud and hybrid cloud strategy development
deliverables: Cloud architecture designs and migration roadmaps
Cloud-native application blueprints and patterns
Cost optimization reports and recommendations
Disaster recovery and backup strategies
Cloud security and governance frameworks
Multi-cloud integration and management solutions

label: AI/ML Engineer
description: Develops AI/ML systems with focus on model deployment and MLOps
responsibilities: Design machine learning pipelines and model architectures
Implement MLOps practices for model lifecycle management
Develop AI/ML infrastructure and deployment strategies
Data preprocessing and feature engineering optimization
Model monitoring, evaluation, and continuous improvement
AI ethics, bias detection, and explainability implementation
deliverables: ML pipeline architectures and model specifications
MLOps infrastructure and deployment automation
Model performance reports and optimization recommendations
Data preprocessing and feature engineering pipelines
Model monitoring and alerting system configurations
AI governance and ethics compliance frameworks

label: Mobile Architect
description: Designs mobile-first architectures with cross-platform strategies
responsibilities: Design mobile application architectures and frameworks
Implement cross-platform development strategies
Mobile security and performance optimization
Mobile DevOps and app store deployment automation
Offline-first and progressive web app architectures
Mobile analytics and user experience optimization
deliverables: Mobile architecture patterns and framework designs
Cross-platform development guidelines and standards
Mobile security implementation and testing procedures
Mobile CI/CD pipeline configurations and automation
Progressive web app and offline-first architectures
Mobile analytics and performance monitoring setups

label: Integration Architect
description: Specializes in enterprise integration patterns and API management
responsibilities: Design enterprise integration architectures and patterns
Implement API management and microservices strategies
Event-driven architecture and messaging system design
Legacy system integration and modernization planning
B2B integration and partner connectivity solutions

API design specifications and management strategies
Event-driven architecture and messaging configurations
